scripts.build:pages: PAGES_BASE=/Workback next build && rm -rf docs && cp -r out docs && touch docs/.nojekyll
scripts.verify: npx -y tsx scripts/verify-logic.ts && npx -y tsx scripts/verify-persistence.ts && npx -y tsx scripts/verify-estimator.ts && npx -y tsx scripts/verify-bidspecs.ts && npx -y tsx scripts/verify-aicp.ts
scripts.smoke: npx -y tsx --tsconfig scripts/tsconfig.smoke.json scripts/smoke-ui.tsx && npx -y tsx --tsconfig scripts/tsconfig.smoke.json scripts/smoke-bidspecs.tsx && npx -y tsx --tsconfig scripts/tsconfig.smoke.json scripts/smoke-aicp.tsx
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only database --project demo-workback "npx -y tsx scripts/rules-test.ts"
scripts.battle: npm run verify && npm run stress && npm run smoke
